GLINVSLOTS.quickdrawFull: All {max} quickdraw slots are already assigned.
GLINVSLOTS.basicSupplyTooltip: Basic supply — does not occupy inventory slots

dialog.overrideHint: Leave empty to use the calculated value. Size override affects the base slot formula. Max slots override replaces the entire calculation.

notch.armorNotched: Armor took damage from a critical hit!
notch.weaponNotched: Weapon took damage from a critical fumble!
notch.focusNotched: Focus took damage from a critical fumble!
notch.sacrificeWarning: This will irreparably destroy the item!

ammo.trackIndividualHint: Magic/special ammo — track each shot individually
ammo.noPairing: No ammo items found on this character

pool.discardHint: Dice showing this value or below are removed

enableSlotSystem.name: Enable Inventory Slot System
enableSlotSystem.hint: Replace weight-based encumbrance with the slot/bulk inventory system from Darker Dungeons.

enableForNPCs.name: Enable for NPCs
enableForNPCs.hint: Apply the inventory slot system to NPC sheets as well as player characters.

enableQuickdraw.name: Quickdraw Variant
enableQuickdraw.hint: Allow players to mark items as quickdraw (free action to draw). Non-quickdraw items require a full action.

quickdrawSlots.name: Quickdraw Slots
quickdrawSlots.hint: Maximum number of items that can be designated as quickdraw.

enablePackEndurance.name: Pack Endurance Variant
enablePackEndurance.hint: Use the higher of Strength or Constitution modifier for inventory slot calculation.

enableObjectScaling.name: Object Scaling
enableObjectScaling.hint: Allow items to have scaled sizes (tiny to gargantuan) that shift their bulk category.

enableEncumbranceEffects.name: Encumbrance Effects
enableEncumbranceEffects.hint: Automatically track encumbrance state when carrying exceeds capacity (speed halved, disadvantage on STR/DEX/CON checks).

enableContainerRules.name: Container Rules
enableContainerRules.hint: Containers have internal slots equal to their bulk rating. Items inside count toward the container, not the character.

enableBasicSupplies.name: Basic Supplies
enableBasicSupplies.hint: Allow marking items as basic supplies (ration box, waterskin, purse) that don't occupy inventory slots.

enableArmorSlotCost.name: Armor Slot Cost
enableArmorSlotCost.hint: Armor continues to occupy inventory slots when worn, using the armor bulk table based on creature size.

autoBulkFromWeight.name: Auto-Calculate Bulk from Weight
autoBulkFromWeight.hint: Automatically derive bulk category from item weight when no manual bulk is set.

showBulkColumn.name: Show Bulk Column
showBulkColumn.hint: Display a Bulk column in the inventory table alongside Weight.

replaceEncumbranceBar.name: Replace Encumbrance Bar
replaceEncumbranceBar.hint: Override Tidy 5e's encumbrance bar to show slot usage instead of weight.

enableWearAndTear.name: Wear & Tear (Notch System)
enableWearAndTear.hint: Track item degradation via notches. Weapons lose damage dice, armor loses AC, and items can shatter.

enableTempering.name: Tempering
enableTempering.hint: Allow items to be tempered (Pure, Royal, Astral) to reduce notch gain from critical failures.

autoNotchOnCrit.name: Auto-Notch on Crits/Fumbles
autoNotchOnCrit.hint: Automatically add notches when critical hits damage armor or critical fumbles damage weapons.

enableAmmunitionDice.name: Ammunition Dice
enableAmmunitionDice.hint: Replace individual ammo counting with dice. After each shot, roll the ammo die — on a 1 or 2, the die degrades.

autoRollAmmoDice.name: Auto-Roll Ammo Dice
autoRollAmmoDice.hint: Automatically roll the ammunition die when an attack with that ammo is made.

enableDicePool.name: Dice Pool System
enableDicePool.hint: Allow marking items to use a dice pool. Roll the pool on use — dice at or below the discard threshold are removed. Item is depleted when pool is empty.

errors.tidyRequired: GLUniverse Inventory Slots requires the Tidy 5e Sheet module to be active.
